title: Cleared neon purple HUD
description: Resource pack replaces inventory and hotbar with neon purple color with transparent background
body:
---
**This resource pack changes the hotbar, inventory to a neon purple color with a transparent background.**

**It has changed the book of knowledge, inventory, potion effects, hotbar, menu, settings, etc.**
